title: ExFISH Protocols For Cells and Tissues
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f73mu","text":"These are Expansion FISH (ExFISH) protocols for super-resolution imaging of RNA structure and location with diffraction-limited microscopes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dr4jq","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"81o57","text":"Please select the appropriate protocol depending on your sample (cells or tissue).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Ed Boyden
